ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* RL algorithm used (e.g., PPO, DQN) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment used (e.g., CartPole, Atari) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who initiated the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment for reproducibility */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key used for securing experiment data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the experiment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that generated this result */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward obtained during the experiment */,
  "policy_execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the policy */,
  "environment_execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the environment */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the result */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the result for reproducibility */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key used for securing result data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the result was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result that this iteration belongs to */,
  "avg_forward_vel" REAL /* Average forward velocity during the iteration */,
  "time_sample_proc" REAL /* Time taken for sampling and processing */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return obtained during the iteration */,
  "avg_final_forward_vel" REAL /* Average final forward velocity during the iteration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the iteration data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the iteration */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the iteration data for reproducibility */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key used for securing iteration data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the iteration data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES experiment_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that used this hyperparameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, gamma) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who set the hyperparameters */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the hyperparameters */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the hyperparameters for reproducibility */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key used for securing hyperparameter data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the hyperparameters were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., CartPole, Atari) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who added the environment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the environment for reproducibility */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key used for securing environment data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the environment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., PPO, DQN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who added the algorithm */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm for reproducibility */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key used for securing algorithm data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the algorithm was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the experiment */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the result */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_access_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES experiment_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the iteration */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the iteration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_access_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)
